allow:

echo "=== TEST 1: Standard injection ==="
curl -sk "https://localhost:8089/services/splunk_query_tester/query_tester?output_mode=json" \\
  -H "Authorization: Splunk $SESSION_KEY" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{
    "testName": "Playwright Standard Test",
    "app": "search",
    "testType": "scenario",
    "query": "index=main sourcetype=test_data | stats count by status",
    "earliestTime": "-24h@h",
    "latestTime": "now",
    "scenarios": [{
      "name": "Scenario 1",
      "inputs": [{
        "rowIdentifier": "index=main sourcetype=test_data",
        "inputMode": "event_table",
        "events": [
          {"status": "200"},
          {"status": "200"},
          {"status": "404"}
        ]
      }]
    }],
    "validation": {
      "validationType": "field",
      "fieldConditions": [],
      "fieldGroups": [],
      "fieldLogic": "and",
      "validationScope": "all",
      "scopeN": null,
      "resultCount": null
    }
  }' 2>/dev/null | py -3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo "Raw output above")
Bash(cd "C:/Program Files/Splunk" && ./bin/splunk search "index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd log_level=ERROR scheduled_tests" -maxout 10 -auth admin:Qwer1234 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(cd "C:/Program Files/Splunk" && ./bin/splunk search "index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd ERROR QueryTester" -maxout 5 -auth admin:Qwer1234 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(cd "C:/Program Files/Splunk" && ./bin/splunk search "index=_internal sourcetype=splunkd_stderr QueryTester OR scheduled_tests OR saved_tests" -maxout 10 -auth admin:Qwer1234 2>&1 | tail -40)
